questionHtml: Avocados are known to be a good source of dietary fibre and contain all the essential amino acids. Distinguish between essential and non-essential amino acids.
markschemeHtml: essential amino acids must be included in the diet and the body cannot make them «whereas the body can synthesize non-essential amino acids» ✔

meta.title: Avocados are known to be a good source of dietary fibre and contain all the essential amino acids. Distinguish between essential and non-essential amino acids.
